svg.title: KDS and billing ordering system flow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing order flow from table QR or reception through KDS to billing and payment

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the QR table ordering auth flow in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain the reception billing flow in detail')
sendPrompt('How does the QR auth work without OTP?')
sendPrompt('How long does the table session last?')
sendPrompt('What can a customer edit before order is submitted?')
sendPrompt('What happens when staff clicks Start Preparing?')
sendPrompt('What does the KDS screen show?')
g.text: Order card with each item + tick buttons

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Preparing status mean on KDS?')
sendPrompt('What happens when all items are marked Ready?')
sendPrompt('Where does the bell notification appear?')
